description.brazilian: Gere uma imagem (surreal) com a inteligência artificial.

description.japanese: 人工知能を使って、シュールな画像を生成する。

description.schinese: 使用AI生成一张超现实图片。

description.turkish: Yapay zeka ile bir görsel (sürreal) üret.

description.brazilian: Escolha jogar Bannerlords durante a stream.
description.english: Choose Bannerlord as the game you'll play during your stream.
description.indonesian: Pilih Banner Lord sebagai game yang akan kamu mainkan selama streaming berlangsung.
description.italian: Scegli Bannerlord come gioco per lo streaming.
description.japanese: 配信でプレイするゲームに『バナーロード』を選ぶ。
description.koreana: 방송 중 플레이할 게임으로 '마운트 앤 블레이드 2'를 선택하십시오.
description.russian: Выбирайте игру "Bannerlord" в качестве вашей основной игры во время стрима.
description.schinese: 选择《骑马与砍杀2：霸主》作为直播游戏。
description.tchinese: 選擇《騎馬與砍殺2：霸主》作為直播遊戲。
description.thai: เลือก Bannerlord เป็นเกมที่คุณจะเล่นระหว่างการสตรีมของคุณ
description.turkish: Yayında oynayacağın oyun olarak Bannerlord'u seç.

description.brazilian: Escolha jogar Anomaly Agent durante a stream.
description.english: Choose Anomaly Agent as the game you will play on stream.
description.french: Sélectionnez Anomaly Agent pour votre stream.

description.brazilian: Não tolere o assédio de Birdie.
description.french: Ne tolérez pas le harcèlement de Birdie.
description.german: Lass dir von Birdie nichts gefallen.
description.italian: Non tollerare le molestie di Birdie.
description.japanese: 小鳥ちゃんのハラスメントを許さない。
description.schinese: 不对小鸟的骚扰置之不理。
description.spanish: No toleres el acoso de Birdie.
description.tchinese: 不對小鳥的騷擾置之不理。
description.thai: ไม่ยอมรับการคุกคามของ Birdie

displayName.thai: ไม่ตื่นตระหนก

description.brazilian: Conclua as cenas de concentração durante os momentos de pânico.
description.english: Complete the focus scenes that occur during moments of panic.
description.french: Terminez les scènes de concentration dans les moments de panique.
description.indonesian: Lengkapkan adegan-adegan fokus yang terjadi ketika momen-momen panik.
description.italian: Completa le scene di concentrazione durante i momenti di panico.
description.japanese: パニック状態の集中シーンをすべてクリアする。
description.koreana: 패닉 상황 중 발생하는 집중 장면들을 완료하십시오.
description.russian: Пройдите все сцены с высоким уровнем внимания во время панических приступов.
description.schinese: 完成慌乱期间出现的专注场景。
description.spanish: Completa las escenas de concentración en momentos de pánico.
description.tchinese: 完成慌亂期間出現的專注場景。
description.thai: ทำฉากโฟกัสให้สำเร็จทั้งหมดที่เกิดขึ้นในช่วงเวลาที่ตื่นตระหนก
description.turkish: Panik anlarında gelen odaklanma sahnelerini tamamla.

description.english: Fail four times with your character in the minigames within the game.
description.indonesian: Gagal empat kali dengan karaktermu di minigame dalam game.
description.italian: Fallisci quattro volte con il tuo personaggio nei minigiochi all'interno del gioco.
description.japanese: ミニゲームでキャラクターが4回失敗する。
description.koreana: 미니게임 내에서 자신의 캐릭터로 네 번 실패하십시오.
description.russian: Потерпите неудачу в мини-играх четыре раза во время основной игры.
description.schinese: 在游戏环节的小游戏中失败四次。
description.spanish: Falla cuatro veces en los minijuegos.
description.tchinese: 在遊戲環節的小遊戲中失敗四次。
description.thai: ล้มเหลวสี่ครั้งกับตัวละครของคุณในมินิเกมภายในเกม
description.turkish: Oyun içindeki mini oyunlarda karakterinle dört kez başarısız ol.

description.spanish: Encuentra la pista clave contra Semih.
description.tchinese: 發現指控塞米赫的關鍵證據。
description.thai: หาหลักฐานสำคัญเพื่อใช้เอาผิดกับ Semih

displayName.thai: ความยุติธรรมได้รับการพิพากษา

description.brazilian: Informe ao seu irmão quem é o verdadeiro culpado e tenha sucesso na invasão.
description.english: In the finale, report the correct culprit to your brother and succeed in the raid.
description.french: Indiquez à votre frère le coupable et terminez la descente.
description.german: Sag deinem Bruder, wer der wahre Täter ist, und schließe die Razzia ab.
description.indonesian: Di babak akhir, laporkan pelaku yang benar kepada saudaramu dan sukses dalam serangan.
description.italian: Nel finale, denuncia il colpevole corretto a tuo fratello e porta a compimento l'irruzione.
description.japanese: 最終章で正しい犯人を兄に報告し、警察の突入を成功させる。
description.koreana: 마지막 챕터에서 진짜 범인을 오빠에게 알리고 급습을 성공시키십시오.
description.russian: Расскажите вашему брату о настоящем нарушителе спокойствия в финале игры, а также одержите победу в игровом набеге.
description.schinese: 在终章中向你的哥哥揭露真正的凶手，并且成功完成突袭行动。
description.spanish: Dile a tu hermano el culpable correcto y consigue completar la redada.
description.tchinese: 在終章中向你的哥哥揭露真正的兇手，並且成功完成突襲行動。
description.thai: ในฉากสุดท้าย รายงานผู้กระทำผิดที่ถูกต้องให้พี่ชายของคุณและประสบความสำเร็จในการบุก
description.turkish: Finalde abine doğru suçluyu söyle ve baskını başar.

displayName.thai: ดวงตาแห่งโพรวิเดนซ์

description.english: See all the main endings of the game.
description.indonesian: Lihat semua pengakhiran cerita utama dalam game ini.
description.italian: Vedi tutti i finali principali del gioco.
description.japanese: ゲーム内のすべてのメインエンディングを見る。
description.thai: ดูตอนจบหลักทั้งหมดของเกม

displayName.thai: สตรีแห่งอเมซอน

description.japanese: 他の実績をすべて解除する。
description.thai: รับความสำเร็จอื่น ๆ ทั้งหมด
